ham.subject: Your Daily Account Summary – $1,234.56 Transaction
ham.body:
Dear John,

This is a notification from your Financial Services Team regarding a recent transaction on your account.

• Date: 07/04/2026
• Transaction ID: TXN-20260407-001
• Amount: $1,234.56
• Description: Purchase at "Tech Gear Outlet"

Your available balance is now $5,678.90. Please review the details above and let us know if you notice any discrepancies.

Thank you for banking with us.

Best regards,
Customer Support Team
Finance Corp.

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Payroll Update
spam.body:
Dear John,

We have detected an issue with your payroll processing for the current month. To avoid a delay in your salary, you must confirm your account details within the next 24 hours.

Please click the link below to verify your information:
<URL>

If you do not complete this verification, your next paycheck may be withheld. This is a security measure required by our new compliance policy.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Payroll Administration
HR Department
